messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: WIRING SLICE — the score, the report and the leaderboard must actually CONSUME survival and rework, or the epic stays dark
What it solves: THIS IS THE EPIC'S MANDATORY WIRING SLICE. The engineering article's rule is explicit and this
epic is the exact shape it warns about: an emit -> route -> consume pipeline whose slices are pure
foundation modules is NOT complete until a slice CALLS them on a real trigger and persists their
result. …
How it works: A model's quality is what survived, not what it first produced

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-388 - WIRING SLICE — the score, the report and the leaderboard must actually CONSUME survival and rework, or the epic stays dark is complete.
